title: China’s Xi talks with Ukraine’s Zelenskyy by phone for the first time since Russia's invasion
description: Chinese leader Xi Jinping appealed for negotiations between Russia and Ukraine in a phone call Wednesday with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy, warning ?...
